reve.prompt: High-fashion editorial photography in the style of Vogue portraits, glamorous woman white backless dress intricate straps, narrow wooden hallway, over-the-shoulder look, warm cinematic low-key lighting, ultra-realistic skin detail

grok-imagine.prompt: Ultra-realistic editorial fashion portrait of glamorous brunette woman in fitted white textured backless dress with spaghetti straps and intricate back design, posing sideways in narrow wooden hallway looking over shoulder at camera, warm low-key cinematic lighting with soft shadows, Canon 50mm shallow depth of field

gpt-image-1.5.prompt: An ultra-realistic editorial fashion portrait of a glamorous woman in her mid to late 20s posing sideways in a narrow wooden hallway. She has sleek brunette hair, long and glossy, flowing straight past her shoulders with natural strand separation, subtle flyaways, and soft root shadows. She turns her head over her shoulder to look back at the camera with a confident and sensual expression. Her makeup is soft glam with bronzed warmth, rosy blush, soft nude glossy lips, defined brows, and neutral eyeshadow with long lashes. Her skin shows visible pores, micro-texture, and soft peach fuzz with natural imperfections. She wears a fitted white textured backless dress with thin spaghetti straps and an intricate open-back strap design that hugs her body elegantly creating a sculpted feminine silhouette. One arm is raised and resting against the wooden wall while the other relaxes by her side, creating an elegant spine curve. The narrow wooden hallway creates moody atmosphere with layered depth and natural shadows. Warm low-key cinematic lighting provides gentle highlights on her skin and soft shadows along body contours. Shot with Canon EOS 5D Mark IV, 50mm f/1.8 at f/2.8, ISO 400, shallow depth of field. No plastic skin. No airbrushed texture. Realistic editorial quality.
gpt-image-1.5.notes: Natural language paragraphs, explicit preservation constraints, no quality tags

seedream-4.5.prompt: Glamorous brunette woman posing sideways in narrow wooden hallway turning head over shoulder, sleek glossy hair with strand separation and flyaways, confident sensual expression soft glam makeup bronzed warmth nude glossy lips, fitted white textured backless dress spaghetti straps intricate open-back design, arm raised against wooden wall elegant spine curve, warm low-key cinematic lighting soft shadows, Canon 50mm shallow depth of field, ultra-realistic editorial fashion portrait with visible skin texture, not airbrushed or plastic-looking
seedream-4.5.notes: Coherent natural language, subject first, concise photography terms, inline style negation

flux-kontext-max.prompt: A glamorous brunette woman in her mid to late 20s poses sideways in a narrow wooden hallway, turning her head over her shoulder to look back at the camera. Her sleek glossy brunette hair flows past her shoulders with natural strand separation. She has a confident sensual expression with soft glam makeup, bronzed warmth, and nude glossy lips. She wears a fitted white textured backless dress with thin spaghetti straps and intricate open-back strap design. One arm rests against the wooden wall while the other relaxes by her side. Warm low-key cinematic lighting creates gentle skin highlights and soft shadows. Shot with shallow depth of field, ultra-realistic editorial fashion quality with visible skin texture and natural imperfections.
flux-kontext-max.editing_prompt: Change the dress color from white to deep burgundy while keeping the same backless design and intricate strap details. Preserve the warm cinematic lighting, her confident over-shoulder pose, and the wooden hallway setting exactly.
flux-kontext-max.notes: Natural language with preservation clauses for editing mode, 512 token limit

playbook_principles_applied: 1_hierarchical_specificity: Detailed dress (backless, spaghetti straps, intricate back design), precise makeup breakdown, hair strand details
2_realism_anchors: 'visible pores and peach fuzz', 'hair strand separation', 'wooden texture', 'strap detail'
4_negative_hygiene: prevents plastic skin, airbrushed, oversaturated, HDR
5_spatial_consistency: clear sideways pose with over-shoulder look and arm positions
6_lighting_storytelling: 'warm low-key cinematic' = moody luxury evening editorial mood
7_editorial_quality: specific camera settings and 'RAW photorealistic unedited' tags
